icon: <svg viewBox="0 0 100 100" fill="none" stroke="#C88A2E" stroke-width="7" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" role="img" aria-label="nCm"><title>nCm — Nova Colheita da Madeira</title><path d="M69 29 A27 27 0 1 0 69 71"/><path d="M15 86 Q28 80 39 86 Q50 92 61 86 Q72 80 85 86"/></svg>
name: nCm — Nova Colheita da Madeira
hook: Farm 2.0 for a fraction of the price: Madeira's programmes pay up to 85% of your farm's modernization — turnkey.
description: Nova Colheita da Madeira teaches farmers the technologies of the future — drip irrigation, sensors, smart greenhouse, cold storage, solar, drone — and the key point: Madeira's programmes (F.1 PEPAC) pay up to 85% of that modernization. The Farm 2.0 builder turns the plan into three numbers: cost, what the programme pays, your share. Then one window: paperwork, IFAP registration, application in the right window, follow-through to payout. Direct payments (POSEI, Single Application, ANC, organic) as the farm's regular income. The project neither grants subsidies nor holds the farmer's money. A rung on the ILYNQ ladder: solar on the greenhouse links to nEm, processing to nAm. Technology first — the subsidy is the fuel for growth.
lookingFor: Pilot farms · Cooperatives · Agritech suppliers · SRA partner

how: Build your farm 2.0 in the constructor: irrigation, sensors, greenhouse, cold storage, solar, drone — and instantly see three numbers: cost, what the programme pays, your share.
Answer 7 questions — we confirm the programmes and your rate: base 65%, young farmer up to 85%.
Your plan for the future is ready: technologies with amounts + the farm's regular payments (POSEI, Single Application, ANC, organic) — honest count, tier A/B.
We prepare documents and IFAP registration, apply in the right window: direct — annual; F.1 investment and young-farmer premium — by aviso.
We follow through to payout. From you — just one word: «I want in».
proofs: 26 years of full-cycle agribusiness (Kartofel / Freshland): production, cold storage, sales — farm 2.0 built by hand before it was a trend.
Real Madeira instruments: F.1 investment up to 85% (Portaria 583/2025 — young-farmer premium F.1.2), POSEI, Single Application, ANC, agri-environment.
Channels worked: SRA Madeira, IFAP, AREAM, cooperatives — entry via feiras and the Regional Directorate of Agriculture.
Honest count (tier A/B): direct and formula payments in the headline; competitive investment measures on a separate track, no inflated promises.
vision: Every modernized farm is an Opportunity record and proof of method, not a slide.
The ILYNQ ladder in action: solar on the greenhouse → nEm, processing and marketing → nAm; the client grows rung by rung.
ILYNQ horizon: tech-driven agriculture + the island's surplus clean energy as the foundation of distributed AI. We prepare it, we don't claim it as already operational.
